evals.prompt: Create a code map for this Flask project
evals.expected_output: PROJECT_MAP.md with modules, dependency graph, and file change guide + PROJECT_MAP.html with working interactive visualization

evals.prompt: I need to understand the architecture of this Next.js app before making changes. Can you map it out?
evals.expected_output: Both MD and HTML maps generated with correct module groupings, React component tree captured as dependencies

evals.prompt: Map out the connections between files in my project so I know where to modify things
evals.expected_output: File Change Guide section with accurate modification targets, interactive graph showing dependency chains
